race.description: XXXX SIDELINE BEER GARDEN BOOK NOW QTIS MDN PLATE
race.comment: PYROLYSIS (9) brings NSW formlines to the table and should find this assignment a touch easier. Looks very well placed here by the Baker barn and should be right there when the whips are cracking. PIERATA'S SPIRIT (3) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Can run a bold race on debut. MAGIC INVADER (2) has placed four of five this time in work and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Has to be included. The well-related DUCHESS DIFFICULT (5) (half to G3 winner Run Harry Run) just ran into one better at the Sunny Coast on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Can feature with natural improvement. GOSSAMER GLOW (6) best of the rest.
